cdi.content: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <?xml-stylesheet type="text/xsl" href="http://openlcb.org/trunk/prototypes/xml/xslt/cdi.xsl"?> <cdi xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="http://openlcb.org/schema/cdi/1/4/cdi.xsd"> <identification> <manufacturer>MANU</manufacturer> <model>MODEL</model> <hardwareVersion>2.6A</hardwareVersion> <softwareVersion>2.1</softwareVersion> </identification> <acdi/> <segment origin="0" space="253"> <name>Node</name> <group> <name>Node ID</name> <description>User-provided description of the node</description> <string size="62"> <name>Node Name</name> </string> <string size="63"> <name>Node Description</name> </string> </group> </segment> <segment origin="125" space="253"> <name>Reset Control</name> <description>Controls Actions at Next Board Reset. Reloading User or Factory Defaults</description> <int size="1"> <name>Flag</name> <default>238</default> <map> <relation> <property>238</property> <value>Normal Operation</value> </relation> <relation> <property>51</property> <value>Clear Everything but Create New Unused EventIDs</value> </relation> <relation> <property>255</property> <value>Clear Everything back to Factory Defaults</value> </relation> </map> </int> </segment> <segment origin="127" space="253"> <name>Attributes</name> <int size="1"> <name>Number of Strings</name> <description>Number of NeoPixel strings</description> <min>0</min> <max>4</max> <default>2</default> <hints> <slider tickSpacing="1" immediate="no" showValue="yes"/> </hints> </int> <int size="1"> <name>Maximum Luminosity</name> <description>Full luminesence factor</description> <min>10</min> <max>255</max> <default>100</default> <hints> <slider tickSpacing="60" immediate="no" showValue="yes"/> </hints> </int> <eventid> <name>Full Luminosity On</name> </eventid> <int size="1"> <name>Minimum Luminosity</name> <description>Dimmed luminesence factor</description> <min>10</min> <max>255</max> <default>20</default> <hints> <slider tickSpacing="60" immediate="no" showValue="yes"/> </hints> </int> <eventid> <name>Low Luminosity On</name> </eventid> <int size="1"> <name>Effect Cycle Frequency</name> <description>Milliseconds between effect processing</description> <min>10</min> <max>255</max> <default>100</default> <hints> <slider tickSpacing="60" immediate="no" showValue="yes"/> </hints> </int> </segment> <segment origin="147" space="253"> <name>Controls</name> <description>Use these to control groupings of individual LEDs across all active strings.</description> <!-- Tab 1=all, 2=street, 3=exterior, 4=business, 5=residential, 6=secondary --> <group replication="6"> <name>Group</name> <repname>All</repname> <repname>Street</repname> <repname>Exterior</repname> <repname>Business</repname> <repname>Residential</repname> <repname>Secondary</repname> <eventid> <name>Turn Group On</name> </eventid> <eventid> <name>Turn Group OFF</name> </eventid> <int size="1"> <name>On Hour</name> <description>Hour of the day that the group turns on</description> <min>0</min> <max>23</max> <default>0</default> </int> <int size="1"> <name>On Minute</name> <description>Minute of the hour that the group turns on</description> <min>0</min> <max>59</max> <default>0</default> </int> <int size="1"> <name>Off Hour</name> <description>Hour of the day that the group turns off</description> <min>0</min> <max>23</max> <default>0</default> </int> <int size="1"> <name>Off Minute</name> <description>Minute of the hour that the group turns off</description> <min>0</min> <max>59</max> <default>0</default> </int> </group> </segment> <segment origin="339" space="253"> <name>Strings</name> <description>Parameters for the lighting area NeoPixel strings</description> <group replication="4"> <name>String</name> <repname>String 1</repname> <string size="21"> <name>Description</name> </string> <int size="1"> <name>Number of heads</name> <description>Number of heads in the Neo-Pixel string</description> <min>0</min> <max>30</max> <default>5</default> <hints> <slider tickSpacing="5" immediate="no" showValue="yes"/> </hints> </int> <eventid> <name>All On</name> </eventid> <eventid> <name>All Off</name> </eventid> <eventid> <name>All Toggle</name> </eventid> <eventid> <name>Effects On</name> </eventid> <eventid> <name>Effects Off</name> </eventid> <eventid> <name>Effects Toggle</name> </eventid> <eventid> <name>Dimmer Toggle</name> </eventid> <group replication="20"> <name>Neo-Pixels</name> <repname>1</repname> <string size="21"> <name>Description</name> </string> <group replication="3"> <name>Head Lead</name> <repname>Red</repname> <repname>Green</repname> <repname>Blue</repname> <int size="1"> <name>Intensity</name> <description>Brightness of the LED</description> <min>0</min> <max>255</max> <default>100</default> <hints> <slider tickSpacing="64" immediate="no" showValue="yes"/> </hints> </int> <int size="1"> <name>Cycles On</name> <description>Number of effect cycles for the LED to be on</description> <min>0</min> <max>10</max> <default>5</default> </int> <int size="1"> <name>Cycles Off</name> <description>Number of effect cycles for the LED to be off</description> <min>0</min> <max>10</max> <default>5</default> </int> <int size="1"> <name>Starting Cycle</name> <default>0</default> <map> <relation> <property>0</property> <value>Normal</value> </relation> <relation> <property>1</property> <value>Alternating</value> </relation> </map> </int> <int size="1"> <name>Effect</name> <default>1</default> <map> <relation> <property>0</property> <value>Off</value> </relation> <relation> <property>1</property> <value>Constant</value> </relation> <relation> <property>2</property> <value>Blink</value> </relation> <relation> <property>3</property> <value>Flicker</value> </relation> </map> </int> <int size="1"> <name>Group</name> <default>0</default> <map> <relation> <property>0</property> <value>All</value> </relation> <relation> <property>1</property> <value>Street</value> </relation> <relation> <property>2</property> <value>Exterior</value> </relation> <relation> <property>3</property> <value>Business</value> </relation> <relation> <property>4</property> <value>Residential</value> </relation> <relation> <property>5</property> <value>Secondary</value> </relation> </map> </int> </group> </group> </group> </segment> </cdi>
